nasb.text: saying, “Do not harm the earth or the sea or the trees until we have sealed the bond-servants of our God on their foreheads.”

esv.text: saying, “Do not harm the earth or the sea or the trees, until we have sealed the servants of our God on their foreheads.”

cnv.text: 說：“你們不要傷害地、海和樹木，等我們在　神眾僕人的額上先蓋上了印。”

ccb.text: “我们还没在上帝的奴仆额上盖印之前，你们不可伤害地、海和树木。”

csbs.text: 说：“不要伤害大地、海洋和树木，直到我们在我们神的奴仆们额上盖了印。”
